description: Block BEAR entries where entry bar body_pct < 0.20 (doji/wick-dominant = no directional conviction on entry bar)
methodology: Full orchestrator IS/OOS A/B with entry_bar_body_pct_min=0.20 parameter. Post-hoc analysis used for discovery; orchestrator run for verification (minor differences due to cascade effects).
ratification_basis: OP-22 auto-ratify: all 5 gates pass. J standing directive: 'I am no blocker. if its profitable implement it'

implementation.gate_logic: If entry_bar_body_pct_min > 0.0 and winning_side == P: compute body_pct of entry bar via _bar_geometry(bar); if body_pct < entry_bar_body_pct_min: skip entry with SKIP_DOJI_ENTRY_BAR
implementation.applies_to: BEAR entries only (BULL not yet analyzed)

discovery.finding: IS BEAR entry_body<0.20: n=16, WR=31.2%, total=-$466 (net negative on IS)
discovery.oos_finding: OOS BEAR entry_body<0.20: n=3, WR=0.0%, total=-$293 (0 winners in OOS)

notes: OOS improvement (+$566) exceeds IS improvement (+$295). Strong OOS signal: 4 OOS blocked trades all lost with avg -$141/trade. SW3_early26 (Jan-Feb 2026) regressed (-$314) — likely post-tariff whipsaw period where even doji entries sometimes worked. 2 of 3 sub-windows improved significantly.
